name: Mummy Lord
languages: The languages it knew in life

spellcasting.description: The mummy lord casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17):

traits.name: Legendary Resistance (3/Day)
traits.description: If the mummy lord fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.

traits.name: Rejuvenation
traits.description: A destroyed mummy lord gains a new body in 24 hours if its heart is intact, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the mummy lord's heart.

traits.name: Spellcasting
traits.description: The mummy lord casts one of the following spells, using Wisdom as the spellcasting ability (spell save DC 17): At will: Sacred Flame, Thaumaturgy; 1/day each: Animate Dead, Contagion, Dispel Magic, Harm, Insect Plague, Silence

actions.name: Multiattack
actions.description: The mummy lord can use Dreadful Glare and makes one Rotting Fist attack, or it makes two Rotting Fist attacks.

actions.name: Rotting Fist
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +9, reach 5 ft. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) Bludgeoning damage plus 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with mummy rot. The cursed target can't regain hit points, and its hit point maximum decreases by 10 (3d6) for every 24 hours that elapse. If the curse reduces the target's hit point maximum to 0, the target dies, and its body turns to dust. The curse lasts until removed by the remove curse spell or other magic.

actions.name: Dreadful Glare
actions.description: The mummy lord targets one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. If the target can see the mummy lord, the target must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw against this magic or have the Frightened condition until the end of the mummy lord's next turn. If the target fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it also has the Paralyzed condition for the same duration. A target that succeeds on the saving throw is immune to all mummy lords' Dreadful Glare for the next 24 hours.

legendary_actions.description: The mummy lord can take 3 legendary actions, choosing from the options below. Only one legendary action option can be used at a time and only at the end of another creature's turn. The mummy lord regains spent legendary actions at the start of its turn.

actions.name: Attack
actions.description: The mummy lord makes one Rotting Fist attack.

actions.name: Blinding Dust
actions.description: Blinding dust and sand swirls magically around the mummy lord. Each creature within 5 feet of the mummy lord must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or have the Blinded condition until the end of the creature's next turn.

actions.name: Blasphemous Word (Costs 2 Actions)
actions.description: The mummy lord utters a blasphemous word. Each non-undead creature within 10 feet of the mummy lord that can hear the magical utterance must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be stunned until the end of the mummy lord's next turn.

actions.name: Channel Negative Energy (Costs 2 Actions)
actions.description: The mummy lord magically unleashes negative energy. Creatures within 60 feet of the mummy lord, including ones behind barriers and around corners, can't regain hit points until the end of the mummy lord's next turn.

actions.name: Whirlwind of Sand (Costs 2 Actions)
actions.description: The mummy lord magically transforms into a whirlwind of sand, moves up to 60 feet, and reverts to its normal form. While in whirlwind form, the mummy lord is immune to all damage, and it can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. Each creature whose space the mummy lord enters must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 21 (6d6) Necrotic damage, and if it is Large or smaller, it has the Restrained condition until the end of its next turn. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and isn't Restrained.

tactical_info.environment: Ancient tomb complexes, lost desert cities, cursed pyramids, forgotten temples
tactical_info.tactics: Combines spellcasting with legendary actions, uses whirlwind mobility, devastating mummy rot curse, multiple control options
tactical_info.weaknesses: Vulnerable to fire damage, relies on heart for rejuvenation, slow base movement speed
